resolvedQuestions.answer: Mechanically safe IF nesting depth preserved. Runtime carries own node_modules/package.json/tsconfig as a unit. system-spec-kit path coupling is depth-invariant. No orphaned entry points. mode-registry.json + 3 command entry points are rename keystones.

14 relative requires (workflows->runtime) break LOUDLY (MODULE_NOT_FOUND); 50 string literals (runtime->workflows in compile-command-contracts.cjs + 2 other scripts) break SILENTLY. check-contract-drift.cjs is the built-in migration gate.

system-spec-kit coupling is NEUTRAL to merge (3 depth-invariant intentional seams). Merge is net simplification on workflows<->runtime axis (15 requires + 50 literals become intra-skill). Do NOT inline review-research-paths.cjs.

6 migration tiers by loudness. Advisor corpus highest-risk (MERGED_DEEP_SKILL_ID -> ~40 routing entries, coupled-pair atomic migration gated by drift-guard). .claude/agents mirror is silent trap. 2 automated guards bound risk; ungated prose needs grep pass.
Do NOT wire fallback-router during merge. Zero callers confirmed; wiring is 4-piece feature out of scope; approval-guard rejects unapproved MiMo swaps. Preserve router, track as post-merge follow-up.

keyFindings.finding: node_modules tooling-borrow ALREADY RESOLVED: runtime ships own package.json with bare specifiers for zod/better-sqlite3/tsx. Only tsc borrowed at dev-time. 117-research '8 reach-ins' claim is STALE.
system-spec-kit path coupling is depth-invariant to rename: both old/new homes at skills/<skill>/lib/deep-loop/ depth.
14 workflows->runtime requires break loudly; repair is mechanical (depth + skill-name).
50 runtime->workflows string literals in compile-command-contracts.cjs break SILENTLY — highest-risk coupling class.
check-contract-drift.cjs is a built-in migration-completeness gate if migrated first.
Merge is net simplification on workflows<->runtime axis (cross-skill -> intra-skill) and NEUTRAL on system-spec-kit axis.
advisor MERGED_DEEP_SKILL_ID='deep-loop-workflows' propagates to ~40 routing entries; registry + maps are coupled-pair requiring atomic migration.
.claude/agents mirror (5 files x 2 runtimes) is silent-migration trap; ungated prose.
fallback-router.ts zero callers confirmed; dormant but valid. Wiring is 4-piece feature. Approval-guard rejects unapproved MiMo swaps.
